errors.probable_root_cause: tsconfig targets ES5 but uses Set/Map iterators with spread operator
errors.prevention_rule: NEVER use spread on Set/Map. Always Array.from(). Check tsconfig target before using iterators.

errors.signature: TS2345: string|undefined not assignable to string in Supabase result
errors.probable_root_cause: Supabase query results can be null/undefined; not null-checked before use
errors.suggested_fix: Add null checks: data?.field ?? defaultValue or early return if !data
errors.prevention_rule: All Supabase query results are nullable. Always null-check before accessing properties.

errors.signature: SQL: policy already exists for table
errors.probable_root_cause: Migration creates RLS policy without checking existence first
errors.suggested_fix: Always use DROP POLICY IF EXISTS before CREATE POLICY in migrations
errors.prevention_rule: In SQL migrations: DROP POLICY IF EXISTS before CREATE POLICY. Use DO $$ blocks for idempotency.

errors.signature: TS7006: catch parameter implicitly has any type
errors.probable_root_cause: catch block uses untyped parameter instead of err: unknown
errors.suggested_fix: Use catch (err: unknown) and toErrorResponse(err) helper
errors.prevention_rule: Always type catch as unknown. Use toErrorResponse(err) from lib/moments/errors.ts for API routes.

errors.signature: TS: await has no effect on params in Next.js 14 route handler
errors.probable_root_cause: params is not a Promise in Next.js 14 route handlers
errors.suggested_fix: Use const { id } = params not const { id } = await params
errors.prevention_rule: In Next.js 14 App Router: params in route.ts are NOT promises. Never await params directly.

errors.suggested_fix: Check the error output and fix accordingly
errors.prevention_rule: Artifact from agent worktree execution — excluded via vitest.config.ts exclude pattern
